summary: S1000D maintenance illustration showing the LA100 main battery as a synthetic (simplified) schematic. A rectangular symbol represents the battery with two connection lines extending from its left and right sides. Two part callouts are associated with the battery: hotspot 01 identifies LA-24-5001-2 at the top of the battery, and hotspot 02 identifies LA-24-5002-6 at the bottom. A corrosion/eye-protection warning is displayed above the figure.
safety_warnings: WARNING: Battery acid is corrosive. Wear eye protection.
